characters.description: A classless survivor left beside a stream after an ambush shatters his skills and strips away much of his equipment. Though alive, he cannot safely depend on the abilities that once made him formidable.
characters.name: Randidly Ghosthound

characters.description: A fourteen-year-old survivor whose early strengths favor magic. Thrown into danger when Earth changes, he responds with improvised courage.
characters.name: Simon Bliss

characters.description: Randidly's Spear Phantom mentor from earlier in the series. His training and the path connected to his fighting tradition continue to shape Randidly's development.
characters.name: Shal

characters.description: A returning settlement strategist who balances long-term planning with a determination to keep any one leader's authority in check.
characters.name: Mrs. Hamilton

characters.description: A returning Earth-side ally who is personally connected to Randidly through one of his blessings.
characters.name: Annie

characters.description: A returning ally and Dawnsmith.
characters.name: Sam

characters.description: A tree linked to Randidly through an unusual living connection established earlier in the series.
characters.name: Arbor

characters.description: One of Zone 32's two opposed champions. She offers Soul Bond to those who pledge to her and is regarded as comparatively fair by nearby villages.
characters.name: Wild Rider

characters.description: The champion opposed to the Wild Rider, commanding skeletons, zombies, and crypt spiders from the Badlands. His pledges are offered Ancient Stamina.
characters.name: Skeleton Knight

characters.description: The name used by the critically injured stranger Simon nurses back to consciousness. He carries exceptional potions and can condense Simon's strongest healing liquid, suggesting resources and knowledge far beyond the local norm.
characters.name: David

characters.description: A missing friend whose face is being used by the being that attacked Randidly. Her actual condition and location are unknown when Randidly begins recovering.
characters.name: Lyra

characters.description: A hostile being that appears in Lyra's form and has attacked Randidly. Its nature, location, and capabilities remain unclear as he begins recovering.
characters.name: Creature using Lyra's identity

characters.description: A Wild Rider pledge bonded to Chrysanthemum, an intelligent giant black bear. She meets Simon and David on the road and escorts them toward Star Crossing.
characters.name: Bear-riding Wild Rider pledge

characters.description: A young guard brought forward to oppose David during the skeleton assault on Star Crossing.
characters.name: Vandal

characters.description: The human leader of a Skeleton Knight-aligned escort. His assessment of David's speed and strength quickly tells him that the stranger is far beyond an ordinary local fighter.
characters.name: Drake

characters.description: A skeletal mage who retains personhood while serving among the Skeleton Knight's forces. He attacks David with dark magic and layered curses during the fight around the reanimator.
characters.name: Copernicus

characters.description: A sealed presence inside Randidly's soul skill. He recognizes her but is not yet prepared to risk direct contact with her.
characters.name: Lucretia

characters.description: The calculating leader of a large eastern village allied with the Skeleton Knight. After hearing of David's strength, she orders a renewed mission to seize him and Simon.
characters.name: Sydney

characters.description: A being already present within Randidly's Aether that bears the destructive backlash ravaging him. Randidly must seek its help to survive.
characters.name: Bone-worm companion

characters.description: A twelve-year-old participant in the Wild Rider's animal ceremony. Her sensitivity to animals and her fear-based predictive ability make her unusually alert to danger within the crowded enclosure.
characters.name: Gemma

characters.description: The administrator controlling entry to a fortified northern refuge. She can identify other people's skills and evaluates newcomers with close attention to the danger they may pose.
characters.name: Rose Calloway

characters.description: Rose Calloway's mute, highly capable bodyguard at the fortified refuge.
characters.name: Brute

characters.description: The public identity of Ace, Randidly's oldest friend and the refuge's leading champion. His power and authority have made the settlement a place governed through demanding tests of strength.
characters.name: Dauntless

characters.description: A former companion of Ace whose dispute with him over Roy's endangered settlement leaves their relationship badly damaged.
characters.name: Sidney

characters.description: One of the four people connected to Randidly by his blessings. After returning to his settlement, he turns toward her as he assesses the allies available for the approaching crisis.
characters.name: Alana

characters.description: The local leader of the Weavers that emerged near Arbor. She explains that her spiders crossed from Randidly's soul world, lost contact with their greater matriarch, and cannot return.
characters.name: Weaver matriarch

characters.description: A practical source of support who advises Annie about her unsettled emotions after childbirth.
characters.name: Regina

characters.description: Annie's newborn daughter. A weaker branch of Randidly's blessing connection reaches her through her mother.
characters.name: Delilah

characters.description: A performer whose emotions visibly affect her aura. Randidly seeks her candid assessment of the settlement, treating her perspective as a useful measure of its civic health.
characters.name: Raina

characters.description: Raina's manager, an emotionally sensitive man who is romantically attached to her. Randidly's presence is unusually difficult for him to read.
characters.name: Stan

characters.description: A distant connection whose persistent refusal to surrender reaches Randidly while he is defining the purpose of his new class.
characters.name: Helen
